headline: Anthropic addresses Claude Code quality issues as identity verification rolls out
body: Anthropic published a postmortem on recent Claude Code quality reports while simultaneously implementing photo ID verification for new users. The vendor is also expanding Claude's capabilities into real-time collaboration, with third-party developers demonstrating meeting integration features. For healthcare AI practitioners, these moves signal Anthropic's attempt to balance rapid feature deployment with safety and compliance controls. The identity verification requirement matters directly for organizations handling PHI, as it establishes baseline user accountability in production environments. Healthcare systems evaluating Claude for clinical documentation or decision support should monitor how these quality improvements and security measures affect enterprise readiness.
